english: Peaceful in form, reclining on a serpent, lotus-naveled, lord of gods
roman: Shanta karam bhujaga shayanam Padma nabham Suresham

english: Support of the universe, sky-like, cloud-complexioned, with auspicious limbs
roman: Vishwa dharam gagana sadrisham megha varnam Shubhangam

english: Beloved of Lakshmi, lotus-eyed, attained through yogic meditation
roman: Lakshmi kantam kamala nayanam yogibhir dhyana gamyam

english: I salute Vishnu, the remover of worldly fear, the sole lord of all worlds
roman: Vande Vishnum bhava bhaya haram sarva lokaika natham

english: Reclining in the milk ocean, resting on the serpent Shesha
roman: Kshira samudre shayanam Shesha naga shayanam

english: The beloved of Lakshmi, Narayana — salutations, salutations, salutations
roman: Lakshmi vallabham Narayanam namo namo namah

english: Whoever reads this Vishnu Stuti daily with devotion
roman: Vishnu stutim idam yah pathet nityam bhakti samanvitah

hindi: वैकुण्ठधाम निलयं विष्णोः साम्यं प्राप्नोति निश्चितम्॥
english: Certainly attains Vaikuntha abode and becomes equal to Vishnu
roman: Vaikuntha dhama nilayam Vishno samyam prapnoti nishchitam
